denomination_relation: Primary reserve-class unit; stores scarcity as memory before exchange.
substrate: Black-gold archival coin face, renderable as icon, card, and museum plate.
issuance_logic: Issued only when a canonical ITEM record represents retained potential rather than active circulation.
anti_entropy_claim: Represents value held against dissipation by preserving scarcity as structured memory.
use_case: Reserve artifact, ontology reference, high-order denomination family seed.
visual_grammar: Dense black field, restrained gold radiance, vault-like concentric geometry, minimal ornament.
color_grammar: Black, deep blue-black, antique gold, controlled white core.
geometric_grammar: Nested rings, sealed center, pressure lines, archival border.
legibility_constraints: Must remain readable at 64px icon scale; no microtext required for identity.
provenance: Derived from ACCRE–ITEM Currency Handshake and VMS triad semantics.
